tagline: Tampa Bay's Trusted Custom Pool Builder

hero.headline: Your Dream Pool, Built the Right Way
hero.subheadline: Most pool builders hand you off to a crew and disappear. At Larsen's, owner Eric Larsen stays personally involved from first sketch to final splash. 18 years of custom shotcrete pools built on time, on budget, and backed by Tampa Bay's best reputation.

services.label: Our Services
services.headline: Custom Pool Construction &<br class="hidden md:block"> Complete Outdoor Transformations
services.subtitle: From award-winning custom pools to stunning water features and full renovations, we bring your backyard vision to life with craftsmanship that lasts decades.

cards.title: Custom Pool Construction
cards.description: Custom shotcrete pools engineered for superior strength and unlimited design flexibility. Unique shapes, integrated spas, sun shelves, tanning ledges, and built-in features tailored to your lifestyle.

cards.title: Pool Renovation
cards.description: Complete pool remodeling with modern finishes, updated tile work, new coping, and improved functionality. We breathe new life into aging pools across the Greater Tampa Bay Area.

cards.title: Water Features
cards.description: Custom waterfalls, spillovers, bubblers, deck jets, and rain curtains designed to enhance the beauty and ambiance of your outdoor living space.

cards.title: Fire Features
cards.description: Fire bowls, fire pits, and fire walls that complement your pool design and create stunning focal points for evening entertainment and relaxation.

cards.title: 3D Pool Design
cards.description: Advanced 3D visualization that lets you walk through your dream pool before a single shovel hits the ground. Every detail confirmed before construction begins.

cards.title: Pool Equipment Service
cards.description: As a Hayward Certified Warranty Center, we provide in-house equipment service, repairs, and warranty work to keep your pool running at peak performance year-round.

how_it_works.headline: From Vision to Backyard Paradise in Three Steps

steps.title: Free Design Consultation
steps.description: Meet directly with Eric and our design team. We listen to your vision, assess your yard, discuss your budget, and create a custom 3D rendering so you can see your dream pool before committing.

steps.title: Transparent Construction Process
steps.description: Our six-stage payment schedule means you only pay as milestones are completed. Eric and project manager Reid oversee every phase personally, keeping you informed and on track.

steps.title: Dive Into Your New Pool
steps.description: Your custom pool is delivered on time, on budget, and built to last. Plus, as a Hayward Certified Warranty Center, we are here for equipment support and service long after the last tile is set.

about.label: Why Tampa Bay Trusts Larsen's
about.headline: The Owner Answers Your Call. Every Single Time.
about.description: Eric Larsen started Larsen's Pool & Spa in 2008 after years of watching other builders blow budgets, miss deadlines, and leave homeowners frustrated. He built this company on a simple Golden Rule: treat every client the way you would want to be treated. That means Eric stays personally accessible throughout your entire project, supported by designers Adam and Dan and project manager Reid. With an A+ BBB rating, zero DBPR complaints, and the Angi Super Service Award every year since 2010, our track record speaks for itself.

features.title: Certified Pool Operator on Staff
features.description: A CPO-certified professional is involved in every phase of your project, from design through construction to final water chemistry balancing.

features.title: Transparent Payment Schedule
features.description: Our six-stage payment plan ties every dollar to completed milestones. No deposits into the void, no surprise charges, no hidden contract terms.

features.title: Award-Winning Craftsmanship
features.description: PHTA International Awards of Excellence, FSPA Design Award, and Best of Florida 2025 recipient. We do not just build pools, we build award winners.

pricing.headline: Honest Pricing. No Hidden Surprises.
pricing.subtitle: Every project comes with a detailed contract, a six-stage payment schedule tied to completed milestones, and zero hidden fees. You see exactly where every dollar goes.

guarantee.headline: Our "Golden Rule" Guarantee
guarantee.description: We treat your pool project exactly the way we would want ours treated. That means honest timelines, transparent pricing, and craftsmanship we are proud to put our name on. If anything falls short of your expectations during construction, we make it right before moving to the next phase. With 18 years, 192 five-star reviews, and zero regulatory complaints, our guarantee is not just words, it is our track record.

faqs.question: How long does a custom pool build typically take?
faqs.answer: Most custom shotcrete pool builds take 8 to 14 weeks depending on the design complexity, permitting timelines, and weather conditions. During your consultation, we provide a detailed construction timeline specific to your project so you know exactly what to expect.

faqs.question: Why shotcrete instead of fiberglass?
faqs.answer: Shotcrete pools offer superior structural strength, unlimited design flexibility, and decades of durability. Unlike fiberglass shells that come in fixed shapes and sizes, shotcrete allows us to build any shape, depth, or feature you can dream up, perfectly customized to your backyard.

faqs.question: Will the owner actually be involved in my project?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. Eric Larsen is personally accessible and involved in every project from initial design through final walkthrough. You will also work directly with our dedicated designers and project manager Reid, who oversees day-to-day construction progress.

faqs.question: How does the payment schedule work?
faqs.answer: We use a transparent six-stage payment plan where each payment is tied to a completed construction milestone. You never pay ahead of the work being done. Our contract is straightforward with no hidden fees, no escalation clauses, and no surprises.

faqs.question: Do you handle pool equipment repairs after construction?
faqs.answer: Yes. As a Hayward Certified Warranty Center with a Certified Pool Operator on staff, we provide ongoing equipment service, repairs, and warranty work. Many clients rely on us for years after their pool is built.

testimonials.name: Shane B.
testimonials.text: They are big enough to do amazing work but small enough for personal attention. Exactly what you want in a pool builder.

testimonials.name: Pedro Leon
testimonials.context: Pool Construction, Completed Ahead of Schedule
testimonials.text: Pool completed ahead of schedule. Project manager Reid went above and beyond. Could not be happier with the results.

testimonials.name: Breun R.
testimonials.text: 2 years after construction and I can always rely on Larsen's to quickly assist with questions. They truly care even after the job is complete.
